description: Blessed baseline for the 1.7B live-instruct golden (#1099). Records identity cosines across instructs, per-emotion delivery loudness (the _LIVE_INSTRUCT_GAIN lever), and the batched-RTF baseline for the expressive_passage fixture. Bless on a GPU box with Qwen weights: npm run test:golden-audio -- --bless (or GOLDEN_BLESS=1). Unblessed (entries null) => the assert test SKIPs.

metadata.box: 8GB CUDA GPU (Windows 11), Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-Base, warm, clean VRAM at start
metadata.notes: Identity cosine max ~0.0125 across instructs (spike ~0.0139); batched RTF 0.51 on the 15-sentence expressive_passage mixed-emotion fixture.
